content.en:
Although the body of the Eightfold Supreme was shattered by Ye Tianyi's fingers, it was not killed in an instant.

After all, the strength of this Eightfold Supreme is also very strong, even the top Ninefold Supreme cannot kill a peak Eightfold Supreme in one blow, but this Eightfold Supreme is still severely damaged.

"Shattered Void Sword!"

Ye Tian immediately unleashed an Eternal Technique, and although he didn't have the power to urge the Eternal Realm Fingers, his regular combat power had also reached the top Eightfold Supreme level.

In addition, this Eightfold Supreme didn't have much combat power left, and he was not Ye Tian's opponent at all.

Soon, this Eightfold Supreme was killed by Ye Tian.

"This man has found a lot of good things!"

After Ye Tian probed the opponent's void ball, he couldn't help but say excitedly.

Killing an Eightfold Supreme is much cooler than slowly searching for resources.

Of course, he will not deliberately look for other supreme beings to kill, as long as they don't provoke themselves, they won't make a move, if they develop the habit of hunting others, one day they will also be hunted by other half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses, and then all their gains will go to others.

Just like this Eightfold Supreme One, he thought he could hunt others, but he died at Ye Tian's hands.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian was more careful.

After all, what he encountered this time was only an eightfold supreme being, and if he met a half-step Eternal Realm, he would not be an opponent of the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

As a result, Ye Tian turned on the talent of copying all the time.

In a place like the Primordial Sea, copying talent was more useful than perception, and once he detected that a half-step Eternal Realm was approaching, he would flee as soon as possible.

Only then can he guarantee his own safety.

In the following period, once Ye Tian detected the half-step Eternal Realm, he left as fast as he could, avoiding encountering the half-step Eternal Realm, so he did not encounter any danger.

And some supreme beings, after gaining some benefits, resisted the temptation and immediately chose to leave the primordial sea, lest they fall here, and then there will be nothing.

However, most of the supreme beings could not control this temptation, and they all wanted more treasures, and they were reluctant to leave, even if it was dangerous.

With the passage of time, a Supreme One fell in the Primordial Sea, and most of the fallen Supreme Beings died at the hands of other strong people, and only a few Supreme Beings accidentally touched the black mist, thus falling into the black mist.

And on this day, Ye Tian was finally unlucky to encounter the black fog.

......

"This is the Yuanqing Eternal Stone, there is such a big piece!"

Ye Tian passed by a small island and saw the Yuanqing Eternal Stone, and was immediately surprised.

The Yuanqing Eternal Stone is a very precious resource, which can refine the Yuanqing Eternal Liquid, which can help the Eternal Body grow, and is the top Eternal Body auxiliary cultivation resource.

Ye Tian flew down, preparing to take the Yuanqing Eternal Stone.

However, he discovers that the Yuanqing Eternal Stone is connected to the island and must be cut off before he can take the Yuanqing Eternal Stone.

So, he slashed at the root of the Yuanqing Eternal Stone with a single blow, directly separating it from the earth.

Rumble!!!!!

The Yuanqing Eternal Stone was cut off and detached from the island.

But in the next second, he was shocked.

From the place where the Yuanqing Eternal Stone was connected to the earth, there was actually a small space, and at this moment, countless black mist filled the small space.

The speed of these black mist was too fast, a trace faster than Ye Tian's.

"Retreat!"

Ye Tian wanted to escape, but one of his arms was eroded by the black mist.

At the moment when his body was about to be eroded by the black mist, the Eternal Realm finger that Ye Tian's finger was integrated into suddenly felt threatened, because the black mist also wanted to erode the powerful finger of the Eternal Realm, touching the seal on the finger, directly triggering the power of the Eternal Realm.

Bang!!!!!

The black mist was dispersed, and although Ye Tian was also eaten by the power of the Eternal Realm Finger, he managed to save his life and withdraw from this area in time.

The black mist cannot spread indefinitely, it can only spread on this island, so Ye Tian doesn't have to worry.

He stood outside the island, looking at the black fog, and his heart was extremely shocked.

"Fortunately, it's me, if I change to other supremes, I'm afraid I'm going to die, this erosion speed is too fast!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Abrupt.

His expression changed, and his gaze at the black mist became suspicious.

"This ......"

Ye Tian found that this was not a real black fog at all, but a black fog composed of countless black fog insects.

The so-called erosion is that the body has been invaded by the black fog worm and swallowed by the black fog worm.

Each black fog insect is very small, and it shields the perception of divine consciousness to probe, and the supreme divine consciousness will be swallowed when it enters these black fogs, so even if it is a half-step eternal realm, it may not know what the black fog is, and only feel that it is extremely terrifying.

But Ye Tian's copying talent has detected these black mist talents, and the endless talents cover Ye Tian's data panel, all of which are the talents of the black mist insects.

Species: Black fog worm

Power: Eternal Ancestral Endowment

Speed: Eternal Ancestral Endowment

Defense: Eternal Ancestor!

Devour: Eternal Ancestral Endowment

Indestructible: Eternal Ancestor!

......

The talents of these black fog insects are all luxurious, the key is that the number is too terrifying.

Suddenly, Ye Tian burst out laughing.

"There are so many Eternal Ancestral Endowments, I will copy them one by one, even if it takes a little longer, but once the countless Eternal Ancestral Endowments are fused, will it surpass the Eternal Ancestral Endowment?"

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian became excited.

Looking for resources?

No, he can't look at it now.

For him, the talent of these black fog insects is the biggest opportunity.

Copy!

Copy!

Copy!

Copy!

......

In order to speed up the copy, he used the time to speed up the time required for the replication every time he copied an Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

In this way, it didn't take too long for Ye Tian to copy all the talents contained in so many black fog insects.

But.

If you want to merge, it will take too long.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not fuse these talents, and after he went out, he would slowly fuse.

He now has an idea that he can annihilate the doppelganger in the outside world, so that he can give another body as a doppelganger.

So, he prepared to copy the body of the Black Fog Worm.

In this way, even if the Origin Tide passed, he would be able to let the Black Mist Worm clone continue to stay in the Primordial Sea.

Outside.

Ye Tian's doppelganger annihilated himself.

Then, the replicating body located in the primordial sea can use the ability to copy and start replicating a black mist worm.

Wow!

The replication is successful.

A black fog insect appeared in Ye Tian's hand, its size was too small, tens of thousands of times smaller than an ant.

Immediately, Ye Tian's black fog insect clone flew towards the island and mingled with other black fog insects.
